powers.label: Executive Briefing
powers.prompt: Generate an executive briefing for {prefix} project. Include sprint progress, risks, achievements, and next steps.

powers.label: Quarterly Report
powers.prompt: Generate a quarterly business report for {prefix}. Include achievements, metrics, risks, roadmap, and AI adoption.

powers.label: Mitigation Plan
powers.prompt: Create a risk mitigation plan for blocked item {key} "{summary}". Include impact, probability, and action items.

sections.title: Team Delivery
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND sprint in openSprints() AND status = Done

powers.label: Delivery Report
powers.prompt: Generate a delivery report for {prefix} current sprint. Include completed items, velocity, and team performance.
